## Context

<!-- What is the issue or opportunity that motivates this decision? -->

## Decision

<!-- What change do you propose? -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other options were evaluated? Why were they rejected? -->

## Consequences

<!-- What becomes easier? What becomes harder? What is now constrained? -->

## Trade-offs

<!-- What are we giving up? What are we gaining? -->

## Affected Artifacts

<!-- Which parts of the project are affected?
     E.g. .cognition/, knowledge/, architecture/, src/, tests/, docs/ -->

- [ ] Identity (`.cognition/identity/`)
- [ ] Domain model (`.cognition/architect/domain_model.md`)
- [ ] ADRs (`knowledge/architecture-decisions/`)
- [ ] Source code (`src/`)
- [ ] Tests (`tests/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)

## Definition of Done

<!-- What must be true for this proposal to be considered adopted? -->

- [ ] ADR written and accepted (`knowledge/architecture-decisions/NNNN-*.md`)
- [ ] Domain model updated
- [ ] Glossary updated
- [ ] Reviewers assigned
- [ ] Implementation plan created (`.cognition/developer/implementation_plan.md`)
